# Risk-control suggestion

## Which failure mode does this address?

Examples: naked position, stale local state, excessive drawdown, repeated losing signals, API outage, margin insufficiency.

## Proposed control

Describe the rule or mechanism.

## Trigger condition

When should it activate?

## Action

What should the bot do when triggered?

## Verification

How can this be tested without live money?

## Trade-offs

What good trades might this block? What complexity does it add?
